news:
#E-Client v2.1

##-- Changes --

- Added Client Side map finish tracking
-#    ⬑ einish a map on a non DDNet Server and the client will remember and show the finished flag
- Added Performance Stats
-#    ⬑ smaller render in the top left of FPS, Ping and Snap Rate
- Added option to show current checkpoint in movement hud 
-#    ⬑ ec_showhud_player_checkpoint 1
- Added a slightly more compact version to the movement hud 
-#    ⬑ ec_showhud_player_compact 1
- Added Playtime tracking and improved death counter
- Added Option to hide afk players from Player Indicator 
-#    ⬑ ec_indicator_hide_afk 1
- Added more tags to for better search results in the menu
- Added option to use menu colors while not ingame 
-#    ⬑ ec_use_ui_color_offline 1
- Renamed Quick Actions -> Player Actions

##-- Bug Fixes --
- Fixed discord sdk linux issue
- Fixed `.github` command
- Some media island fixes

------

#E-Client v2.0

##-- Changes --
- Added Media Island - Displays your current player media and a Visualizer -> Hovering it (from chat, console or demo viewer) expands it with quick action buttons
- Added a search bar to the entity client settings and visuals menu
- Added Auto Translation using Googles API 
-#    ⬑ ec_translate_auto 0 to turn off
- Added Translation whitelist/blacklist to use alongside auto translation
-#    ⬑ ec_translate_language_whitelist, ec_translate_language_blacklist
- Added Cosmetic Prediction for FoxNetwork servers that are above version 3.2.1
- Added mouse sensitivity decouple options in the Controls tab
- Added ability to select text in entity client news tab
- Added Tide as a developer
- Added option to forcefully show 0.7 skins on any server 
-#    ⬑ ec_force_seven_skin 1

##-- Bug Fixes --
- Fixed server-side rainbow updating twice as fast as it should
- Fixed chat selection/scrolling edge cases

------

#E-Client v1.8.1

##-- Bug Fixes --
- Fixed weird bug where selecting Text in chat wouldn't align with what's shown in chat

------

#E-Client v1.8

##-- Changes --
- Improved gores mode
- Improved chai script performance a bit
- Added Process priority settings, allows setting ddnet priority higher and discords lower (should fix lag when in call)
- Added translate from TClient
- Added scrolling to chat
- Added the ability to select and copy content from chat directly
- Added the abilty to change moving tiles design mode

##-- Bug Fixes --
- Fixed invalid weapon crash
- Fixed warlist info in server browser, it now always updated correctly

------

###Report Bugs to me on Github

I recently made a Ko-fi where you can support me and my work
https://ko-fi.com/qxdFox

Coconut?
#🥥
